response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Language: English. No reference lyrics were provided since it is a conversational video. 2. Manual transcription was utilized fully. 3. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal patterns to avoid cascading delays, and transitions between rapid utterances are kept seamless.
